items.title: Schedule catch-up call with Boris Vaynberg to discuss the round
items.context: Email from borisv@blast.security on Jun 3: 'I would love to catch up either Friday or Monday morning.' Richie followed up on Jun 10 asking about availability this week to discuss the round.

items.title: Confirm scheduling with Idan Basre (Brava Security) for intro call
items.context: Email on Jun 10: Barak Perelman (Opti CEO) intro'd Idan Basre (brava.security) to Richie. Lissette offered time slots Mon Jun 15, Tue Jun 16, Wed Jun 17 ET. Awaiting Idan's confirmation.

items.title: Prep for SMBC cyber security trend meeting at Fin Capital SF office
items.context: Calendar event '(SMBC <> Fin Capital) Meeting for Cyber Security Trend' on Jun 15 at 1 Sansome St with Yuji Ogata, Dawn Berry (SMBC), and Fin Capital team.

items.title: Upload YC batch data
items.context: Calendar reminder 'Upload YC' on Jun 17 — flagged as a personal task to complete by that date.
